query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_reactivation_contacts FROM reactivation_contacts;
SELECT rc.campaignId, COUNT(*) as contacts, MIN(rc.lastBookingDate) as earliest, MAX(rc.lastBookingDate) as latest FROM reactivation_contacts rc GROUP BY rc.campaignId;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user QXWpcJKwPBoGqNG.f679bd03aa5d --database CAeRhAUjAZoEuxNGm5QbPr --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_reactivation_contacts FROM reactivation_contacts;
SELECT rc.campaignId, COUNT(*) as contacts, MIN(rc.lastBookingDate) as earliest, MAX(rc.lastBookingDate) as latest FROM reactivation_contacts rc GROUP BY rc.campaignId;
